agent_summary: Customer reports a wrong transfer of 5000.0 to the recipient. Transaction TXN-9101 matches the claim on both amount and counterparty. Recommend opening a dispute for review.
recommended_next_action: Open dispute case for TXN-9101; freeze any pending settlement to the counterparty and request callback within 2 hours.
customer_reply: Thanks for reaching out — we found a transfer matching your description (reference TXN-9101). Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN, OTP, or password with anyone.
